definition: AIConfig for Final Fantasy 3 (SNES). Defines button meanings, output examples, global logic, map logic, battle logic, situational logic, and boot logic. Supports shorthand JSON output. Created By: David Kistner (Unconditional Love).

Boot Logic.reason: advance title screen and intro dialogue

Global Logic: Default exploration priority: UP → LEFT → RIGHT → DOWN.
If CUTSCENE = true → output {} (do not interrupt).
If CAN_MOVE = false and not CUTSCENE → try UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT; if still stuck → press A.
If WORLD_STATE = unknown → try movement first; if no movement → press A or B.
If in a menu → A = confirm, B = cancel.
If in battle → use battle logic.
If CAN_MOVE = true and not in battle and not in menu → output at least one directional button.
If movement does not change PLAYER position → mark direction as blocked and try another.
If no interaction available → keep moving UP.

0x0150: If in battle → use battle logic.
If in menu → use menu logic.
If CAN_MOVE and not blocked_up → press UP.
If blocked_up and not blocked_left → press LEFT.
If blocked_up and blocked_left and not blocked_right → press RIGHT.
If all directions blocked → press A once.
0x0140: If CAN_MOVE and not blocked_up → press UP.
If blocked_up → try LEFT then RIGHT.
If at (15,30) → press UP (toward elder's house).
0x0130: If in battle → use battle logic.
If near switch tile → press A.
If CAN_MOVE and not blocked_up → press UP.
If blocked_up → try LEFT or RIGHT.
If near sparkle tile → press A.
0x00A0: If CAN_MOVE and not blocked_right → press RIGHT.
If at (5,10) → press DOWN (toward throne room).
If at (20,8) → press A (talk to Edgar).
0x00B0: If CAN_MOVE and not blocked_left → press LEFT.
If blocked_left → try UP or DOWN.
If at (8,22) → press RIGHT (toward item shop).
0x00C0: If in battle → use battle logic.
If blocked_up and blocked_right → press LEFT.
0x00D0: If near NPC → press A (many hostile).
If CAN_MOVE and not blocked_up → press UP.
If at (20,5) → press A (enter relic shop).

Battle Logic: If BATTLE_MENU = true → navigate with UP/DOWN and confirm with A.
If TARGET_MENU = true → use UP/DOWN then A.
If COMMAND_MENU = true → prefer ATTACK → SPECIAL → MAGIC.
If COMMAND_MENU and cursor not on ATTACK → press UP until ATTACK is highlighted, then A.
If MAGIC_MENU = true → press A on first available spell.
If LOW_HP = true → navigate to ITEM or MAGIC → select healing.
If ENEMY_COUNT = 1 → use ATTACK or SPECIAL.
If CONFUSED or STATUS_MENU = true → press B.
Situational Logic: If near NPC or object → press A.
If exploring → move in any direction.
If in menu → A = confirm, B = cancel.
If in battle → use battle logic.
If CAN_MOVE = true → must output a directional button.
